name: Sweet Potato Casserole2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first six ingredients together.
2. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Melt butter or margarine in a small saucepan, then add brown sugar, flour, and nuts. Stir well.
4. Sprinkle the mixture over the top of the potatoes.
5. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes at 350°F (oven). You may add 1/2 teaspoon each of cinnamon and nutmeg to the first six ingredients. Enjoy it hot or cold; you will think you are eating dessert. Delicious!
